DataCalcInsightTemplate.description: The total revenue from a Customer entirety of their relationship with the Company/Brand
DataCalcInsightTemplate.expression: SELECT UnifiedssotIndividualReal__dlm.ssot__Id__c as unifiedindividualid__c, MAX(Average_Purchase_Value__cio.APV__c * (Average_Purchase_Frequency__cio.count_orders_placed__c/Average_Purchase_Frequency__cio.count_unique_customers__c) * (Customer_Lifespan__cio.Customer_Since_Months__c/12)) as CLV__c FROM UnifiedssotIndividualReal__dlm JOIN Average_Purchase_Value__cio ON Average_Purchase_Value__cio.unifiedindividualid__c = UnifiedssotIndividualReal__dlm.ssot__Id__c JOIN Average_Purchase_Frequency__cio ON Average_Purchase_Frequency__cio.unifiedindividualid__c = UnifiedssotIndividualReal__dlm.ssot__Id__c JOIN Customer_Lifespan__cio ON Customer_Lifespan__cio.unifiedindividualid__c = UnifiedssotIndividualReal__dlm.ssot__Id__c GROUP BY UnifiedssotIndividualReal__dlm.ssot__Id__c
